reasons: Public Content Envelope and delivery semantics
Cloudflare public entry and versioned D1 migration semantics

reproducibility.detail: GitHub Actions completed the pinned default Release Gate from a clean checkout on Linux and Windows for implementation commit 99ef1c9; both jobs passed, verified that the gate did not modify tracked files, and uploaded immutable reports with recorded SHA-256 digests.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build, trust/privacy preflight, release-gate tests, Worker checks, FastAPI tests and the immutable release recovery drill pass locally and in the Linux and Windows clean-checkout Release Gate.
evidence: uv run --directory services/api --frozen --extra dev pytest -q: 133 passed, 12 skipped
uv run --directory services/api --frozen --extra dev ruff check .: PASS
release recovery drill: atomic switch, rollback, withdrawal, immutable history and deterministic D1 rebuild PASS
GitHub Actions run 29498808199 Linux and Windows default gates: PASS

public_contracts.detail: Localized search, trusted identity resolution, language-aware canonical redirects, query preservation, unreviewed legacy 404 behavior, malformed-path fail-closed handling and versioned public delivery pass the complete browser and release-gate suites.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Public routes expose only reviewed trusted details, identify the versioned release and delivery state, distinguish complete and partial coverage, preserve fact status, precision and sources, render no-media states and do not expose generated legacy profiles.

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 28-test production browser suite passes in both Linux and Windows clean checkouts and against the immutable Cloudflare Staging deployment; coverage includes bilingual, no-JavaScript, mobile, keyboard, zoom, fallback and canonical-route journeys.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29498808199: Linux Default gate PASS
GitHub Actions run 29498808199: Windows Default gate PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Dynamic axe WCAG A/AA scans, retained incomplete-result annotations, keyboard behavior, 320x800 reflow, bilingual language declaration, 200-percent text resizing, expanded mobile controls and reduced-motion assertions pass in clean-checkout CI and against the immutable Staging deployment.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29498808199 Linux and Windows Automated core WCAG checks: PASS

visual_regression.detail: Required deterministic Linux Chromium 390x844 and 1440x900 screenshot baselines, diff artifacts and named semantic visual review are not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The final Cloudflare production build reports 103 kB shared First Load JS, 107 kB localized Home and Atlas, 108 kB trusted Profile, 128 kB Lineage and 143 kB Global Distribution, all within the approved Slice 1 route budgets.
evidence: shared First Load JS: 103 kB (budget 110 kB)
localized Home and Atlas: 107 kB (budgets 140 kB and 170 kB)
Lineage: 128 kB and Global Distribution: 143 kB (complex-route budget 220 kB)

staging.detail: Implementation commit 99ef1c9 is bound to an immutable Cloudflare frontend Version ID and content checksum, the public API is bound to its active Worker Version ID and release headers, and the complete browser and automated accessibility suites pass against the deployed Staging URL.
evidence: API Worker Version ID 7a2814ed-002f-4f0b-b54c-13a27f0db4af at 100 percent traffic
API response headers: dataset 2026.07.14.3; public schema 1.0.0; database migration 0007
Staging browser suite 28/28 PASS; automated accessibility suite 14/14 PASS

human_signoff.detail: Named bilingual, keyboard, real 200-percent browser zoom, visual, Edge plus Narrator and Firefox plus NVDA sign-off is not yet recorded.

release_decision.detail: Clean-checkout automation and immutable Staging verification are complete for commit 99ef1c9, but Level 3 deterministic screenshot evidence and named bilingual, visual and assistive-technology human sign-off remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as a release GO.
